evals.prompt: I have Smart Label Capture working in my .NET iOS app (see IntegratedViewController.cs), but cashiers complain that the expiry date doesn't always scan. I want the guided validation flow so they can see which fields were captured, type in any field that didn't scan, and confirm before the result is saved.
evals.expected_output: The skill switches to the validation flow: creates LabelCaptureValidationFlowOverlay.Create(labelCapture, dataCaptureView) and attaches it, sets a Listener implementing ILabelCaptureValidationFlowListener (deriving from NSObject, handling OnValidationFlowLabelCaptured and marshaling to the main thread via DispatchQueue.MainQueue/InvokeOnMainThread, plus empty OnManualInputSubmitted / OnValidationFlowResultUpdate), optionally applies LabelCaptureValidationFlowSettings.Create() (e.g. a placeholder for the expiry field). Reads values from the captured fields (Barcode?.Data falling back to Text for manual entries). Does NOT call overlay.OnResume()/OnPause() or set ShouldHandleKeyboardInsetsInternally (Android-only no-ops on iOS). Preserves the label definition / camera setup.

assertions.text: LabelCaptureValidationFlowOverlay.Create(labelCapture, ...) is used to create the validation flow overlay
The overlay is attached to the DataCaptureView (via AddOverlay or by passing the view to Create)
A class implementing ILabelCaptureValidationFlowListener is provided (deriving from NSObject) and set as the overlay's Listener
OnValidationFlowLabelCaptured(IList<LabelField>) is implemented to receive the final confirmed fields
The optional listener methods OnManualInputSubmitted and OnValidationFlowResultUpdate are implemented (at least with empty bodies) for interface compliance
The result handling marshals UI work to the main thread via DispatchQueue.MainQueue.DispatchAsync or UIApplication.SharedApplication.InvokeOnMainThread
overlay.OnResume()/OnPause() are NOT called and ShouldHandleKeyboardInsetsInternally is NOT set (these are Android-only no-ops on iOS)
Field values are read with Barcode?.Data and/or Text (acknowledging manual entries surface as Text)
The existing label definition and camera/context setup are preserved
Deprecated validation-flow settings (MissingFieldsHintText, RequiredFieldErrorText, ManualInputButtonText) are NOT introduced
No Android APIs (RunOnUiThread, Java.Lang.Object listener base, single-arg DataCaptureView.Create, container.AddView) are introduced
